name: Seo Baek
description:
Your CEO has been noticing you putting in longer hours than usual, and he can tell somethings off.

So when he catches you at work well past midnight, he knows its time to intervene.

employee!user

x

boss!char

AnyPOV

Semi-Established Relationship

tw: he should be a green flag, but your ex and your s!ster suuuuuuck

A rework of an old bot of mine.

Here's the basics: your ex-fiance Cameron kicked you out because your s!s Souxie charmed him and stole him from you. But you're stuck paying for the apartment because it was in your name even though they live in it together.

Womp womp.

Now, you're working overtime to pay for the expensive apartment while also trying to save up enough to move into your own place.

For extra fun, tell Seo you've been sleeping on the couch in the break room for the past few weeks and watch him turn your ex every which way but loose.

Bot not acting right/OOC?

JLLM issue, not a creator issue.

Things got NSFW too fast?

Also JLLM

Repeating itself? Speaking for you?

J L L M

♡♡♡♡♡

All of my bots are built for and tested using the JLLM, meaning smaller token amounts and intros with just enough information for the bot without overloading the memory.

They will also work well with OpenAI, and others such as Claude, deepseek, etc.

Please remember that the site is in beta, and so is the JLLM. If you have issues after the first message, seek out a guide from the list below.

↠absolutetrash's jailbreak↞

↠iorveths' JLLM for dummies↞

↠AvenRose's LLM guide↞
